---
title: "SDTM: The DM Domain"
---

::: {.callout-note}
### Session at a Glance

**Total core time: about TODO minutes.**

| Section | Time | Type |
|---|---|---|
| When Do You Use This? + Learning Objectives | TODO | Reading |
| Background | TODO | Reading |
| Example 1 | TODO | Worked example |
| Example 2 | TODO | Worked example |
| What Can Go Wrong | TODO | Reading |
| Exercises | TODO | Practice |
| Comprehension Check | TODO | Self-test |

TODO: how the session splits across sittings for self-paced study.
:::

::: {.callout-tip}
### How to Use the Code in This Session

Every code chunk below is written so you can copy it into your R
console (or an R script) and run it yourself, in the order shown.
Where you see a "Run It Yourself" box, stop and run the code above it
before reading the explanation that follows.
:::

## When Do You Use This?

::: {.callout-tip}
TODO: two or three concrete scenarios that this session answers, ending
with the single question it addresses in bold. Cross-link the
session(s) this one builds on.
:::

## Learning Objectives

After completing this session you will be able to:

- TODO
- TODO
- TODO

## Background: TODO (the one core idea)

*Estimated time: ~TODO minutes (reading)*

TODO: introduce the single idea that ties the session together, concept
before formula.

## Example 1: TODO

TODO: worked example on GLPX-001 data. Show the code, then the output,
then explain it.

### Run It Yourself

TODO: the exact code block the learner should execute before reading on.

### Reading the Output Line by Line

TODO: map each line of output to its plain-English meaning.

## Example 2: TODO

TODO: a second worked example.

### Run It Yourself

TODO.

## What Can Go Wrong

TODO: failure modes and misuse patterns.

### Common misinterpretations

TODO.

## Exercises

TODO: link the exercise file(s) for this session, or state that this
session has no exercise.

## Comprehension Check

TODO: three to five short self-test questions.

::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
### Answers

TODO: answers, collapsed.
:::
